title: Algebraic Geometry v2: BSD Conjecture, Elliptic Curves & Moduli Spaces

group_law.rank_note: Rank r = EML-∞: no algorithm; BSD conjectures r = ord L(E,s) at s=1

elliptic_curves.key_insight: Elliptic curve: equation=EML-2; group law=EML-2; torsion=EML-0; rank=EML-∞; L-fn=EML-3

etale_cohomology.deligne_theorem: Frobenius eigenvalues satisfy |α| = q^{i/2} (Riemann hypothesis for varieties)

moduli_spaces.key_insight: M_g period map=EML-3; étale cohomology=EML-2; boundary/compactification=EML-∞

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Torsion group structure (Mazur ≤16), Betti numbers, dimension formulas
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Weierstrass equation, group law, étale cohomology, Weil conjectures
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: L-function L(E,s) (oscillatory Dirichlet), period map to Jacobian
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: BSD conjecture (rank=EML-∞), moduli compactification M̄_g boundary

key_theorem: The EML Algebraic Geometry Theorem (S205): Elliptic curves span all EML strata: Torsion subgroup = EML-0 (Mazur: ≤16 elements, 15 groups — integer structure). Weierstrass equation y²=x³+ax+b = EML-2 (polynomial). L-function L(E,s) = EML-3 (oscillatory Dirichlet series). BSD conjecture (rank = ord L at s=1) = EML-∞ (fifth Millennium Prize in EML framework). Étale cohomology (Deligne's Weil) = EML-2: proved structure. Moduli M_g period map = EML-3 (theta functions).
rabbit_hole_log: BSD = EML-∞: fifth Millennium Prize (joining RH, NS, confinement, P≠NP)
Torsion = EML-0: Mazur theorem is the EML-0 anchor of elliptic curve theory
Étale cohomology = EML-2: Deligne proved Weil conjectures → EML-2 structure confirmed
